describe-a-person.scene_en: Two classmates talk about their new Chinese teacher.

lines.cn: 你觉得新来的王老师怎么样？
lines.py: Nǐ juéde xīn lái de Wáng lǎoshī zěnmeyàng?
lines.en: What do you think of our new teacher, Ms. Wang?

lines.cn: 她很有经验，对学生也特别耐心。
lines.py: Tā hěn yǒu jīngyàn, duì xuésheng yě tèbié nàixīn.
lines.en: She is very experienced and especially patient with students.

lines.cn: 听说她在国外教过五年中文，难怪发音讲得那么清楚。
lines.py: Tīngshuō tā zài guówài jiāo guo wǔ nián Zhōngwén, nánguài fāyīn jiǎng de nàme qīngchu.
lines.en: I heard she taught Chinese abroad for five years — no wonder she explains pronunciation so clearly.

lines.cn: 对，她性格幽默，上课的时候大家都很活跃。
lines.py: Duì, tā xìnggé yōumò, shàngkè de shíhou dàjiā dōu hěn huóyuè.
lines.en: Right, she has a humorous personality; everyone is very active in her class.

lines.cn: 有这样的老师，我们的汉语水平一定会提高得很快。
lines.py: Yǒu zhèyàng de lǎoshī, wǒmen de Hànyǔ shuǐpíng yídìng huì tígāo de hěn kuài.
lines.en: With a teacher like her, our Chinese will definitely improve quickly.

daily-affairs.scene_en: A student asks a courier clerk about sending a package.

lines.cn: 您好，我想把这个包裹寄到上海，大概需要几天？
lines.py: Nín hǎo, wǒ xiǎng bǎ zhège bāoguǒ jì dào Shànghǎi, dàgài xūyào jǐ tiān?
lines.en: Hello, I would like to send this package to Shanghai. About how many days will it take?

lines.cn: 普通快递三天左右，加急的明天就能到，不过要多付十五块。
lines.py: Pǔtōng kuàidì sān tiān zuǒyòu, jiājí de míngtiān jiù néng dào, búguò yào duō fù shíwǔ kuài.
lines.en: Standard delivery takes about three days; express arrives tomorrow, but costs fifteen yuan extra.

lines.cn: 里面是一些易碎的盒子，麻烦您帮我包好一点儿。
lines.py: Lǐmiàn shì yìxiē yìsuì de hézi, máfan nín bāng wǒ bāo hǎo yìdiǎnr.
lines.en: There are some fragile boxes inside — could you please wrap it carefully?

lines.cn: 没问题。请您先填一下这张快递单，写清楚收件人的地址和电话。
lines.py: Méi wèntí. Qǐng nín xiān tián yíxià zhè zhāng kuàidì dān, xiě qīngchu shōujiànrén de dìzhǐ hé diànhuà.
lines.en: No problem. Please fill in this delivery form first — write the recipient's address and phone number clearly.

lines.cn: 好的，填完了。一共多少钱？
lines.py: Hǎo de, tián wán le. Yígòng duōshao qián?
lines.en: OK, done. How much altogether?

lines.cn: 普通的二十二块。这是您的单号，可以随时查快递到哪儿了。
lines.py: Pǔtōng de èrshí'èr kuài. Zhè shì nín de dānhào, kěyǐ suíshí chá kuàidì dào nǎr le.
lines.en: Twenty-two yuan for standard. Here is your tracking number — you can check where the package is at any time.

social-expressions.scene_en: Congratulating a friend who just got promoted.

lines.cn: 听说你升职了，祝贺你！这是你应得的。
lines.py: Tīngshuō nǐ shēngzhí le, zhùhè nǐ! Zhè shì nǐ yīng dé de.
lines.en: I heard you got promoted — congratulations! You deserve it.

lines.cn: 谢谢！其实我心里还有点儿紧张，怕做不好。
lines.py: Xièxie! Qíshí wǒ xīnli hái yǒudiǎnr jǐnzhāng, pà zuò bu hǎo.
lines.en: Thanks! Actually I am still a bit nervous — afraid I might not do well.

lines.cn: 别担心，你能力那么强，肯定没问题。
lines.py: Bié dānxīn, nǐ nénglì nàme qiáng, kěndìng méi wèntí.
lines.en: Don't worry — you are so capable, it will definitely be fine.

lines.cn: 多亏大家一直支持我。改天我请你们吃饭，好好庆祝一下。
lines.py: Duōkuī dàjiā yìzhí zhīchí wǒ. Gǎitiān wǒ qǐng nǐmen chīfàn, hǎohǎo qìngzhù yíxià.
lines.en: It is thanks to everyone's constant support. Let me treat you all to dinner some day to celebrate properly.

lines.cn: 那我就不客气啦！祝你工作顺利！
lines.py: Nà wǒ jiù bú kèqi la! Zhù nǐ gōngzuò shùnlì!
lines.en: Then I won't be polite! Wishing you smooth sailing at work!

emotions.scene_en: Two friends talk about friendship and ideals.

lines.cn: 我们认识十年了，真正的友谊经得起时间的考验。
lines.py: Wǒmen rènshi shí nián le, zhēnzhèng de yǒuyì jīng de qǐ shíjiān de kǎoyàn.
lines.en: We have known each other for ten years — true friendship stands the test of time.

lines.cn: 是啊，遇到困难的时候，第一个想到的就是你。
lines.py: Shì a, yùdào kùnnan de shíhou, dì yī gè xiǎngdào de jiùshì nǐ.
lines.en: Yes — whenever I run into difficulties, you are the first person I think of.

lines.cn: 对了，你小时候的理想是什么？
lines.py: Duì le, nǐ xiǎoshíhou de lǐxiǎng shì shénme?
lines.en: By the way, what was your dream when you were little?

lines.cn: 我一直想当医生，帮助更多的人。虽然过程很辛苦，但我从来没放弃过。
lines.py: Wǒ yìzhí xiǎng dāng yīshēng, bāngzhù gèng duō de rén. Suīrán guòchéng hěn xīnkǔ, dàn wǒ cónglái méi fàngqì guo.
lines.en: I always wanted to be a doctor and help more people. The process is hard, but I have never given up.

lines.cn: 有理想就要坚持，我相信你一定能实现。
lines.py: Yǒu lǐxiǎng jiù yào jiānchí, wǒ xiāngxìn nǐ yídìng néng shíxiàn.
lines.en: If you have a dream, stick to it — I believe you will make it come true.

food-dining.scene_en: Ordering at a restaurant and asking about the dishes.

lines.cn: 服务员，你们店有什么特色菜？
lines.py: Fúwùyuán, nǐmen diàn yǒu shénme tèsè cài?
lines.en: Waiter, what are your restaurant's special dishes?

lines.cn: 我们的烤鸭最有名，皮脆肉嫩，很多客人专门为它来的。
lines.py: Wǒmen de kǎoyā zuì yǒumíng, pí cuì ròu nèn, hěn duō kèrén zhuānmén wèi tā lái de.
lines.en: Our roast duck is the most famous — crispy skin, tender meat. Many guests come especially for it.

lines.cn: 好，来半只烤鸭。这个汤辣不辣？我不太能吃辣。
lines.py: Hǎo, lái bàn zhī kǎoyā. Zhège tāng là bu là? Wǒ bú tài néng chī là.
lines.en: Great, half a roast duck please. Is this soup spicy? I can't really eat spicy food.

lines.cn: 这个是西红柿鸡蛋汤，一点儿都不辣，味道很清淡。
lines.py: Zhège shì xīhóngshì jīdàn tāng, yìdiǎnr dōu bú là, wèidao hěn qīngdàn.
lines.en: That is tomato and egg soup — not spicy at all, very light.

lines.cn: 那再来一份这个汤。对了，能开发票吗？
lines.py: Nà zài lái yí fèn zhège tāng. Duì le, néng kāi fāpiào ma?
lines.en: Then one of those soups too. Oh — can you issue a receipt?

lines.cn: 可以，吃完后凭小票到前台开就行。
lines.py: Kěyǐ, chī wán hòu píng xiǎopiào dào qiántái kāi jiù xíng.
lines.en: Yes — after your meal just bring the slip to the front desk.

transportation.scene_en: Discussing how to get to the airport during rush hour.

lines.cn: 我明天早上八点的飞机，坐出租车去机场来得及吗？
lines.py: Wǒ míngtiān zǎoshang bā diǎn de fēijī, zuò chūzūchē qù jīchǎng lái de jí ma?
lines.en: My flight is at eight tomorrow morning — is taking a taxi to the airport fast enough?

lines.cn: 早高峰路上特别堵，我建议你坐地铁，时间更有保证。
lines.py: Zǎogāofēng lùshang tèbié dǔ, wǒ jiànyì nǐ zuò dìtiě, shíjiān gèng yǒu bǎozhèng.
lines.en: Traffic is really congested during morning rush hour. I suggest the subway — the timing is more reliable.

lines.cn: 地铁要换几次车？我的行李箱挺大的。
lines.py: Dìtiě yào huàn jǐ cì chē? Wǒ de xínglixiāng tǐng dà de.
lines.en: How many transfers on the subway? My suitcase is pretty big.

lines.cn: 只换一次，而且机场线有放行李的地方，很方便。
lines.py: Zhǐ huàn yí cì, érqiě jīchǎng xiàn yǒu fàng xíngli de dìfang, hěn fāngbiàn.
lines.en: Just one transfer, and the airport line has luggage racks — very convenient.

lines.cn: 那我六点出发，应该来得及。谢谢你的建议！
lines.py: Nà wǒ liù diǎn chūfā, yīnggāi lái de jí. Xièxie nǐ de jiànyì!
lines.en: Then I will leave at six — that should be enough time. Thanks for the advice!

shopping.scene_en: Comparing online and in-store purchases with a friend.

lines.cn: 你这双鞋真好看，在哪儿买的？
lines.py: Nǐ zhè shuāng xié zhēn hǎokàn, zài nǎr mǎi de?
lines.en: Your shoes look great — where did you buy them?

lines.cn: 网上买的，正好赶上打折，比商场便宜两百多块。
lines.py: Wǎngshàng mǎi de, zhènghǎo gǎnshàng dǎzhé, bǐ shāngchǎng piányi liǎngbǎi duō kuài.
lines.en: Online — there happened to be a sale, over two hundred yuan cheaper than the mall.

lines.cn: 网购是便宜，可是我总担心质量没有保证。
lines.py: Wǎnggòu shì piányi, kěshì wǒ zǒng dānxīn zhìliàng méiyǒu bǎozhèng.
lines.en: Online shopping is cheap, but I always worry the quality isn't guaranteed.

lines.cn: 选信用好的店就行。不合适还可以七天无理由退货，挺方便的。
lines.py: Xuǎn xìnyòng hǎo de diàn jiù xíng. Bù héshì hái kěyǐ qī tiān wú lǐyóu tuìhuò, tǐng fāngbiàn de.
lines.en: Just pick shops with good ratings. If it doesn't fit you can return it within seven days, no questions asked — quite convenient.

lines.cn: 那你把店铺链接发给我，我也去看看。
lines.py: Nà nǐ bǎ diànpù liànjiē fā gěi wǒ, wǒ yě qù kànkan.
lines.en: Then send me the shop's link — I'll take a look too.

health-medical.scene_en: Seeing a doctor about a cold.

lines.cn: 大夫，我从昨天开始咳嗽，还有点儿发烧。
lines.py: Dàifu, wǒ cóng zuótiān kāishǐ késou, hái yǒudiǎnr fāshāo.
lines.en: Doctor, I have been coughing since yesterday and have a slight fever.

lines.cn: 我先给你量一下体温。三十八度二，是有点儿发烧。嗓子疼吗？
lines.py: Wǒ xiān gěi nǐ liáng yíxià tǐwēn. Sānshíbā dù èr, shì yǒudiǎnr fāshāo. Sǎngzi téng ma?
lines.en: Let me take your temperature first. 38.2 — yes, a slight fever. Does your throat hurt?

lines.cn: 疼，咽东西的时候特别明显。
lines.py: Téng, yàn dōngxi de shíhou tèbié míngxiǎn.
lines.en: Yes, especially when I swallow.

lines.cn: 是感冒引起的。我给你开点儿药，按时吃，多喝水，注意休息。
lines.py: Shì gǎnmào yǐnqǐ de. Wǒ gěi nǐ kāi diǎnr yào, ànshí chī, duō hē shuǐ, zhùyì xiūxi.
lines.en: It is caused by a cold. I will prescribe some medicine — take it on time, drink plenty of water, and rest well.

lines.cn: 好的。需要打针吗？
lines.py: Hǎo de. Xūyào dǎzhēn ma?
lines.en: OK. Do I need an injection?

lines.cn: 不用，吃三天药应该就好了。要是还发烧，再来医院检查。
lines.py: Búyòng, chī sān tiān yào yīnggāi jiù hǎo le. Yàoshi hái fāshāo, zài lái yīyuàn jiǎnchá.
lines.en: No need — three days of medicine should do it. If the fever continues, come back for a check-up.

hobbies-leisure.scene_en: Talking about hobbies and planning a weekend trip.

lines.cn: 周末你一般做什么？
lines.py: Zhōumò nǐ yìbān zuò shénme?
lines.en: What do you usually do on weekends?

lines.cn: 我喜欢爬山和照相，大自然能让人放松。你呢？
lines.py: Wǒ xǐhuan páshān hé zhàoxiàng, dàzìrán néng ràng rén fàngsōng. Nǐ ne?
lines.en: I like hiking and photography — nature helps you relax. And you?

lines.cn: 我对弹钢琴感兴趣，已经坚持练了三年了。
lines.py: Wǒ duì tán gāngqín gǎn xìngqù, yǐjīng jiānchí liàn le sān nián le.
lines.en: I am interested in playing piano — I have kept at it for three years now.

lines.cn: 厉害！对了，这个周末天气不错，一起去郊区爬山怎么样？
lines.py: Lìhai! Duì le, zhège zhōumò tiānqì búcuò, yìqǐ qù jiāoqū páshān zěnmeyàng?
lines.en: Impressive! By the way, the weather this weekend looks good — how about hiking in the suburbs together?

lines.cn: 好主意！正好放松一下，我把照相机也带上。
lines.py: Hǎo zhǔyi! Zhènghǎo fàngsōng yíxià, wǒ bǎ zhàoxiàngjī yě dài shang.
lines.en: Great idea! A perfect chance to relax — I will bring my camera too.

housing-community.scene_en: Asking a real estate agent about renting an apartment.

lines.cn: 您好，我想租一套两室一厅的房子，最好离地铁站近一点儿。
lines.py: Nín hǎo, wǒ xiǎng zū yí tào liǎng shì yì tīng de fángzi, zuìhǎo lí dìtiězhàn jìn yìdiǎnr.
lines.en: Hello, I am looking to rent a two-bedroom apartment, ideally close to a subway station.

lines.cn: 有一套正合适，走到地铁站只要五分钟，家具家电都是全的。
lines.py: Yǒu yí tào zhèng héshì, zǒu dào dìtiězhàn zhǐ yào wǔ fēnzhōng, jiājù jiādiàn dōu shì quán de.
lines.en: There is one that fits perfectly — five minutes' walk to the subway, fully furnished with appliances.

lines.cn: 房租多少？小区环境怎么样？
lines.py: Fángzū duōshao? Xiǎoqū huánjìng zěnmeyàng?
lines.en: What is the rent? How is the neighborhood?

lines.cn: 一个月四千五。小区很安静，楼下就有超市，对面还有一个公园。
lines.py: Yí gè yuè sìqiān wǔ. Xiǎoqū hěn ānjìng, lóu xià jiù yǒu chāoshì, duìmiàn hái yǒu yí gè gōngyuán.
lines.en: 4,500 a month. The community is quiet, there is a supermarket downstairs and a park across the street.

lines.cn: 听起来不错，今天下午可以看房吗？
lines.py: Tīng qǐlái búcuò, jīntiān xiàwǔ kěyǐ kàn fáng ma?
lines.en: Sounds good — can I view it this afternoon?

lines.cn: 可以，三点我在小区门口等您。
lines.py: Kěyǐ, sān diǎn wǒ zài xiǎoqū ménkǒu děng nín.
lines.en: Sure, I will wait for you at the community gate at three.

family-life.scene_en: A couple divides up the housework.

lines.cn: 今天家里要大扫除，咱们分一下工吧。
lines.py: Jīntiān jiāli yào dàsǎochú, zánmen fēn yíxià gōng ba.
lines.en: We are doing a big clean-up today — let's divide the chores.

lines.cn: 行，我负责擦窗户和拖地，你来收拾厨房怎么样？
lines.py: Xíng, wǒ fùzé cā chuānghu hé tuō dì, nǐ lái shōushi chúfáng zěnmeyàng?
lines.en: OK, I will do the windows and mop the floor; how about you tidy the kitchen?

lines.cn: 没问题。对了，妈妈周末要来，得把客房的床单换了。
lines.py: Méi wèntí. Duì le, māma zhōumò yào lái, děi bǎ kèfáng de chuángdān huàn le.
lines.en: No problem. Oh, Mom is coming this weekend — we need to change the sheets in the guest room.

lines.cn: 我来换。晚上想吃什么？我去买菜。
lines.py: Wǒ lái huàn. Wǎnshang xiǎng chī shénme? Wǒ qù mǎi cài.
lines.en: I will change them. What do you want for dinner? I will go grocery shopping.

lines.cn: 做个鱼吧，妈妈爱吃。家务做完我们早点儿休息。
lines.py: Zuò ge yú ba, māma ài chī. Jiāwù zuò wán wǒmen zǎodiǎnr xiūxi.
lines.en: Let's make fish — Mom loves it. Once the chores are done we can rest early.

education-learning.scene_en: A student asks the teacher how to prepare for the exam.

lines.cn: 老师，下个月就要考试了，我听力部分总是错得很多，怎么办？
lines.py: Lǎoshī, xià gè yuè jiù yào kǎoshì le, wǒ tīnglì bùfen zǒngshì cuò de hěn duō, zěnme bàn?
lines.en: Teacher, the exam is next month and I keep making mistakes in the listening section. What should I do?

lines.cn: 听力要靠平时积累。建议你每天听半个小时的录音，先听大意，再注意细节。
lines.py: Tīnglì yào kào píngshí jīlěi. Jiànyì nǐ měitiān tīng bàn gè xiǎoshí de lùyīn, xiān tīng dàyì, zài zhùyì xìjié.
lines.en: Listening depends on daily accumulation. Listen to recordings for half an hour every day — first for the main idea, then for details.

lines.cn: 生词太多影响理解，要不要先背单词？
lines.py: Shēngcí tài duō yǐngxiǎng lǐjiě, yào bu yào xiān bèi dāncí?
lines.en: Too many new words affect my understanding — should I memorize vocabulary first?

lines.cn: 背单词和做练习要同时进行，光背不用很快就忘了。
lines.py: Bèi dāncí hé zuò liànxí yào tóngshí jìnxíng, guāng bèi bú yòng hěn kuài jiù wàng le.
lines.en: Do both at the same time — if you only memorize without using them, you forget quickly.

lines.cn: 明白了，我按您说的方法试试。谢谢老师！
lines.py: Míngbai le, wǒ àn nín shuō de fāngfǎ shìshi. Xièxie lǎoshī!
lines.en: Got it — I will try the method you suggested. Thank you!

campus-life.scene_en: Two students discuss joining campus clubs.

lines.cn: 学校的社团开始招新了，你想参加哪个？
lines.py: Xuéxiào de shètuán kāishǐ zhāo xīn le, nǐ xiǎng cānjiā nǎge?
lines.en: The campus clubs have started recruiting — which one do you want to join?

lines.cn: 我想报名篮球队，每周训练两次，还能代表学校比赛。
lines.py: Wǒ xiǎng bàomíng lánqiú duì, měi zhōu xùnliàn liǎng cì, hái néng dàibiǎo xuéxiào bǐsài.
lines.en: I want to sign up for the basketball team — training twice a week, and you can compete for the school.

lines.cn: 我在考虑摄影社和汉语角，两个时间正好不冲突。
lines.py: Wǒ zài kǎolǜ shèyǐng shè hé Hànyǔ jiǎo, liǎng gè shíjiān zhènghǎo bù chōngtū.
lines.en: I am considering the photography club and Chinese corner — luckily their schedules don't clash.

lines.cn: 那就都参加吧！大学生活不能只是上课和写作业。
lines.py: Nà jiù dōu cānjiā ba! Dàxué shēnghuó bù néng zhǐshì shàngkè hé xiě zuòyè.
lines.en: Then join both! University life shouldn't just be classes and homework.

lines.cn: 说得对，多参加活动还能认识新朋友。
lines.py: Shuō de duì, duō cānjiā huódòng hái néng rènshi xīn péngyou.
lines.en: True — joining more activities is also a way to make new friends.

education-issues.scene_en: Two parents exchange views on children's education.

lines.cn: 你们家孩子周末上几个补习班？
lines.py: Nǐmen jiā háizi zhōumò shàng jǐ gè bǔxíbān?
lines.en: How many extra classes does your child take on weekends?

lines.cn: 一个都没有。我觉得孩子需要时间玩儿，兴趣比分数更重要。
lines.py: Yí gè dōu méiyǒu. Wǒ juéde háizi xūyào shíjiān wánr, xìngqù bǐ fēnshù gèng zhòngyào.
lines.en: None at all. I think kids need time to play — interest matters more than scores.

lines.cn: 可是别的孩子都在学，我担心他以后跟不上。
lines.py: Kěshì bié de háizi dōu zài xué, wǒ dānxīn tā yǐhòu gēn bu shàng.
lines.en: But all the other kids are studying — I worry mine will fall behind.

lines.cn: 与其让孩子被动地学，不如培养他自己学习的习惯。
lines.py: Yǔqí ràng háizi bèidòng de xué, bùrú péiyǎng tā zìjǐ xuéxí de xíguàn.
lines.en: Rather than making them study passively, it is better to develop their habit of learning on their own.

lines.cn: 你说的也有道理，教育确实不能只看成绩。
lines.py: Nǐ shuō de yě yǒu dàolǐ, jiàoyù quèshí bù néng zhǐ kàn chéngjì.
lines.en: You have a point — education really shouldn't be only about grades.

work-performance.scene_en: A manager gives feedback on an employee's project.

lines.cn: 小李，这次的项目报告做得很详细，客户非常满意。
lines.py: Xiǎo Lǐ, zhè cì de xiàngmù bàogào zuò de hěn xiángxì, kèhù fēicháng mǎnyì.
lines.en: Xiao Li, this project report was very thorough — the client is very satisfied.

lines.cn: 谢谢经理！不过中间出了一个小错误，耽误了两天，真不好意思。
lines.py: Xièxie jīnglǐ! Búguò zhōngjiān chū le yí gè xiǎo cuòwù, dānwu le liǎng tiān, zhēn bù hǎoyìsi.
lines.en: Thank you! Though I made a small mistake midway that delayed us two days — I am sorry about that.

lines.cn: 发现问题及时改正就好。你平时加班太多，也要注意身体。
lines.py: Fāxiàn wèntí jíshí gǎizhèng jiù hǎo. Nǐ píngshí jiābān tài duō, yě yào zhùyì shēntǐ.
lines.en: What matters is you caught and fixed it promptly. You work overtime a lot — take care of your health too.

lines.cn: 好的。下个季度我想试着负责一个新项目，您看可以吗？
lines.py: Hǎo de. Xià gè jìdù wǒ xiǎng shìzhe fùzé yí gè xīn xiàngmù, nín kàn kěyǐ ma?
lines.en: I will. Next quarter I would like to try leading a new project — would that be all right?

lines.cn: 当然可以，我相信你的能力。
lines.py: Dāngrán kěyǐ, wǒ xiāngxìn nǐ de nénglì.
lines.en: Of course — I have confidence in your ability.

career-experience.scene_en: A job interview: introducing professional experience.

lines.cn: 请简单介绍一下您的工作经历。
lines.py: Qǐng jiǎndān jièshào yíxià nín de gōngzuò jīnglì.
lines.en: Please briefly introduce your work experience.

lines.cn: 我毕业后在一家广告公司做了三年设计，去年开始负责整个团队。
lines.py: Wǒ bìyè hòu zài yì jiā guǎnggào gōngsī zuò le sān nián shèjì, qùnián kāishǐ fùzé zhěnggè tuánduì.
lines.en: After graduating I worked three years as a designer at an ad company, and since last year I have led the whole team.

lines.cn: 您为什么想换工作呢？
lines.py: Nín wèishénme xiǎng huàn gōngzuò ne?
lines.en: Why do you want to change jobs?

lines.cn: 贵公司的发展方向和我的职业计划更符合，我希望有更大的发展空间。
lines.py: Guì gōngsī de fāzhǎn fāngxiàng hé wǒ de zhíyè jìhuà gèng fúhé, wǒ xīwàng yǒu gèng dà de fāzhǎn kōngjiān.
lines.en: Your company's direction fits my career plan better — I am looking for more room to grow.

lines.cn: 我们提供五险一金，试用期三个月。您最快什么时候能入职？
lines.py: Wǒmen tígōng wǔ xiǎn yì jīn, shìyòngqī sān gè yuè. Nín zuì kuài shénme shíhou néng rùzhí?
lines.en: We offer full insurance and benefits, with a three-month probation. How soon could you start?

lines.cn: 下个月一号就可以。
lines.py: Xià gè yuè yī hào jiù kěyǐ.
lines.en: The first of next month.

nature.scene_en: Talking about weather differences between north and south.

lines.cn: 你老家在南方，冬天冷吗？
lines.py: Nǐ lǎojiā zài nánfāng, dōngtiān lěng ma?
lines.en: Your hometown is in the south — is winter cold there?

lines.cn: 温度不算低，但是湿度大，感觉比北方还难受。
lines.py: Wēndù bú suàn dī, dànshì shīdù dà, gǎnjué bǐ běifāng hái nánshòu.
lines.en: The temperature isn't that low, but it is humid — it actually feels worse than the north.

lines.cn: 北方虽然零下十几度，可是屋里有暖气，挺舒服的。
lines.py: Běifāng suīrán língxià shí jǐ dù, kěshì wū li yǒu nuǎnqì, tǐng shūfu de.
lines.en: In the north it is minus ten-something, but indoors there is heating — quite comfortable.

lines.cn: 对了，听说你们那儿春天经常刮大风？
lines.py: Duì le, tīngshuō nǐmen nàr chūntiān jīngcháng guā dàfēng?
lines.en: By the way, I heard it is often very windy there in spring?

lines.cn: 是的，有时候还有沙尘。不过秋天特别美，天高云淡。
lines.py: Shì de, yǒushíhou hái yǒu shāchén. Búguò qiūtiān tèbié měi, tiān gāo yún dàn.
lines.en: Yes, sometimes with dust. But autumn is gorgeous — clear skies and light clouds.

environment.scene_en: Roommates discuss garbage sorting and saving energy.

lines.cn: 咱们小区开始垃圾分类了，你知道怎么分吗？
lines.py: Zánmen xiǎoqū kāishǐ lājī fēnlèi le, nǐ zhīdào zěnme fēn ma?
lines.en: Our community has started garbage sorting — do you know how to sort?

lines.cn: 厨房的剩菜是厨余垃圾，塑料瓶和纸盒可以回收。
lines.py: Chúfáng de shèngcài shì chúyú lājī, sùliào píng hé zhǐhé kěyǐ huíshōu.
lines.en: Kitchen leftovers are food waste; plastic bottles and paper boxes are recyclable.

lines.cn: 明白了。其实保护环境还可以从小事做起，比如随手关灯。
lines.py: Míngbai le. Qíshí bǎohù huánjìng hái kěyǐ cóng xiǎoshì zuò qǐ, bǐrú suíshǒu guān dēng.
lines.en: Got it. Actually protecting the environment starts with small things — like turning off lights.

lines.cn: 对，我现在出门都自己带购物袋，少用塑料袋。
lines.py: Duì, wǒ xiànzài chūmén dōu zìjǐ dài gòuwùdài, shǎo yòng sùliàodài.
lines.en: Right — I bring my own shopping bag now and use fewer plastic ones.

lines.cn: 要是每个人都这样做，环境一定会越来越好。
lines.py: Yàoshi měi gè rén dōu zhèyàng zuò, huánjìng yídìng huì yuè lái yuè hǎo.
lines.en: If everyone did this, the environment would definitely get better and better.

technology.scene_en: Helping a parent use mobile payment.

lines.cn: 妈，您装个手机支付吧，买东西扫一下二维码就行。
lines.py: Mā, nín zhuāng ge shǒujī zhīfù ba, mǎi dōngxi sǎo yíxià èrwéimǎ jiù xíng.
lines.en: Mom, install mobile payment — when shopping you just scan a QR code.

lines.cn: 安全吗？我担心把钱弄丢了。
lines.py: Ānquán ma? Wǒ dānxīn bǎ qián nòng diū le.
lines.en: Is it safe? I am afraid of losing my money.

lines.cn: 设置好密码就很安全，比带现金方便多了，还能交水电费。
lines.py: Shèzhì hǎo mìmǎ jiù hěn ānquán, bǐ dài xiànjīn fāngbiàn duō le, hái néng jiāo shuǐdiànfèi.
lines.en: With a password set, it is very safe — much more convenient than cash, and you can pay utility bills too.

lines.cn: 真的吗？那打车也能用吗？
lines.py: Zhēn de ma? Nà dǎchē yě néng yòng ma?
lines.en: Really? Can I use it for taxis too?

lines.cn: 能，用手机叫车，到了直接付款。来，我一步一步教您。
lines.py: Néng, yòng shǒujī jiào chē, dào le zhíjiē fùkuǎn. Lái, wǒ yí bù yí bù jiāo nín.
lines.en: Yes — call a cab on your phone and pay automatically when you arrive. Here, I will teach you step by step.

lines.cn: 好，科技发展得真快，我也得跟上时代。
lines.py: Hǎo, kējì fāzhǎn de zhēn kuài, wǒ yě děi gēnshàng shídài.
lines.en: OK. Technology develops so fast — I need to keep up with the times.

china-provinces.scene_en: Planning which Chinese cities to visit.

lines.cn: 我放假想在中国旅行，你推荐去哪儿？
lines.py: Wǒ fàngjià xiǎng zài Zhōngguó lǚxíng, nǐ tuījiàn qù nǎr?
lines.en: I want to travel in China during the holiday — where do you recommend?

lines.cn: 看你喜欢什么。喜欢历史就去北京、西安，喜欢现代城市就去上海、深圳。
lines.py: Kàn nǐ xǐhuan shénme. Xǐhuan lìshǐ jiù qù Běijīng, Xī'ān, xǐhuan xiàndài chéngshì jiù qù Shànghǎi, Shēnzhèn.
lines.en: Depends what you like. For history go to Beijing or Xi'an; for modern cities, Shanghai or Shenzhen.

lines.cn: 听说云南的少数民族文化很有特色？
lines.py: Tīngshuō Yúnnán de shǎoshù mínzú wénhuà hěn yǒu tèsè?
lines.en: I heard Yunnan's ethnic minority cultures are very distinctive?

lines.cn: 对，云南有二十多个民族，节日、服装、饮食都不一样，风景也美。
lines.py: Duì, Yúnnán yǒu èrshí duō gè mínzú, jiérì, fúzhuāng, yǐnshí dōu bù yíyàng, fēngjǐng yě měi.
lines.en: Yes — Yunnan has over twenty ethnic groups with different festivals, clothing and food, and beautiful scenery.

lines.cn: 那就先去云南！再顺便去四川看大熊猫。
lines.py: Nà jiù xiān qù Yúnnán! Zài shùnbiàn qù Sìchuān kàn dàxióngmāo.
lines.en: Yunnan first then! And Sichuan on the way to see the pandas.

economy.scene_en: Chatting about live-stream shopping and prices.

lines.cn: 现在直播带货特别火，你买过吗？
lines.py: Xiànzài zhíbō dàihuò tèbié huǒ, nǐ mǎi guo ma?
lines.en: Live-stream shopping is really popular now — have you bought anything that way?

lines.cn: 买过几次，价格确实比平时便宜，但也容易买一堆用不上的东西。
lines.py: Mǎi guo jǐ cì, jiàgé quèshí bǐ píngshí piányi, dàn yě róngyì mǎi yì duī yòng bu shàng de dōngxi.
lines.en: A few times. Prices really are lower, but it is easy to end up with a pile of things you never use.

lines.cn: 是啊，促销的时候大家都冲动消费。
lines.py: Shì a, cùxiāo de shíhou dàjiā dōu chōngdòng xiāofèi.
lines.en: Yes — everyone shops impulsively during promotions.

lines.cn: 我现在列好购物单再买，需要什么买什么，节约不少钱。
lines.py: Wǒ xiànzài liè hǎo gòuwùdān zài mǎi, xūyào shénme mǎi shénme, jiéyuē bù shǎo qián.
lines.en: Now I make a shopping list first and only buy what I need — it saves quite a bit.

lines.cn: 这个习惯好，理性消费才是真省钱。
lines.py: Zhège xíguàn hǎo, lǐxìng xiāofèi cái shì zhēn shěng qián.
lines.en: Good habit — rational spending is the real way to save money.

social-phenomena.scene_en: Discussing how phones change daily life.

lines.cn: 你发现没有，现在地铁里几乎人人都在看手机。
lines.py: Nǐ fāxiàn méiyǒu, xiànzài dìtiě li jīhū rénrén dōu zài kàn shǒujī.
lines.en: Have you noticed? On the subway now almost everyone is looking at their phone.

lines.cn: 是啊，网络改变了我们的生活方式，连点菜、挂号都在手机上。
lines.py: Shì a, wǎngluò gǎibiàn le wǒmen de shēnghuó fāngshì, lián diǎn cài, guàhào dōu zài shǒujī shang.
lines.en: Yes — the internet has changed how we live; even ordering food and booking doctor visits happen on the phone.

lines.cn: 方便是方便，不过人和人之间的交流好像变少了。
lines.py: Fāngbiàn shì fāngbiàn, búguò rén hé rén zhījiān de jiāoliú hǎoxiàng biàn shǎo le.
lines.en: Convenient, sure — but face-to-face communication seems to have decreased.

lines.cn: 所以我们家规定，吃饭的时候谁都不许玩儿手机。
lines.py: Suǒyǐ wǒmen jiā guīdìng, chīfàn de shíhou shéi dōu bù xǔ wánr shǒujī.
lines.en: That is why my family has a rule: no phones at the dinner table.

lines.cn: 这个办法不错，科技应该让生活更好，而不是让人更远。
lines.py: Zhège bànfǎ búcuò, kējì yīnggāi ràng shēnghuó gèng hǎo, ér búshì ràng rén gèng yuǎn.
lines.en: Good approach — technology should make life better, not push people apart.

arts-entertainment.scene_en: Inviting a friend to a concert.

lines.cn: 周五晚上有一场音乐会，我有两张票，一起去吧？
lines.py: Zhōuwǔ wǎnshang yǒu yì chǎng yīnyuèhuì, wǒ yǒu liǎng zhāng piào, yìqǐ qù ba?
lines.en: There is a concert Friday evening — I have two tickets. Want to come?

lines.cn: 太好了！是什么类型的演出？
lines.py: Tài hǎo le! Shì shénme lèixíng de yǎnchū?
lines.en: Great! What kind of performance is it?

lines.cn: 民族音乐，有二胡和古筝，听说演员水平很高。
lines.py: Mínzú yīnyuè, yǒu èrhú hé gǔzhēng, tīngshuō yǎnyuán shuǐpíng hěn gāo.
lines.en: Traditional Chinese music with erhu and guzheng — the performers are supposed to be excellent.

lines.cn: 我一直想现场听一次古筝！演出几点开始？
lines.py: Wǒ yìzhí xiǎng xiànchǎng tīng yí cì gǔzhēng! Yǎnchū jǐ diǎn kāishǐ?
lines.en: I have always wanted to hear the guzheng live! What time does it start?

lines.cn: 七点半。我们提前一点儿到，演出开始后就不让进了。
lines.py: Qī diǎn bàn. Wǒmen tíqián yìdiǎnr dào, yǎnchū kāishǐ hòu jiù bú ràng jìn le.
lines.en: 7:30. Let's arrive early — no entry after the performance begins.

sports.scene_en: Talking about a basketball match and exercise habits.

lines.cn: 昨天晚上的篮球比赛你看了吗？
lines.py: Zuótiān wǎnshang de lánqiú bǐsài nǐ kàn le ma?
lines.en: Did you watch the basketball game last night?

lines.cn: 看了！最后三秒才决定胜负，太精彩了！
lines.py: Kàn le! Zuìhòu sān miǎo cái juédìng shèngfù, tài jīngcǎi le!
lines.en: I did! It was decided in the final three seconds — so exciting!

lines.cn: 你平时也打篮球吗？
lines.py: Nǐ píngshí yě dǎ lánqiú ma?
lines.en: Do you play basketball yourself?

lines.cn: 每周打两次，再加上跑步。坚持锻炼以后，感冒都少了。
lines.py: Měi zhōu dǎ liǎng cì, zài jiāshang pǎobù. Jiānchí duànliàn yǐhòu, gǎnmào dōu shǎo le.
lines.en: Twice a week, plus running. Since I started exercising regularly I rarely catch colds.

lines.cn: 我也得动起来，要不周末跟你一起打？
lines.py: Wǒ yě děi dòng qǐlái, yàobù zhōumò gēn nǐ yìqǐ dǎ?
lines.en: I should get moving too — how about I join you this weekend?

lines.cn: 欢迎欢迎，运动贵在坚持！
lines.py: Huānyíng huānyíng, yùndòng guì zài jiānchí!
lines.en: Welcome! With sports, consistency is what counts!

international-friendship.scene_en: An exchange student talks about studying in China.

lines.cn: 你来中国留学两年了，最大的收获是什么？
lines.py: Nǐ lái Zhōngguó liúxué liǎng nián le, zuì dà de shōuhuò shì shénme?
lines.en: You have studied in China for two years — what is your biggest gain?

lines.cn: 除了汉语，还交了很多中国朋友。去年春节我是在同学家过的。
lines.py: Chúle Hànyǔ, hái jiāo le hěn duō Zhōngguó péngyou. Qùnián Chūnjié wǒ shì zài tóngxué jiā guò de.
lines.en: Besides Chinese, I made many Chinese friends. Last Spring Festival I celebrated at a classmate's home.

lines.cn: 真好！你们国家和中国的交流多吗？
lines.py: Zhēn hǎo! Nǐmen guójiā hé Zhōngguó de jiāoliú duō ma?
lines.en: How nice! Is there much exchange between your country and China?

lines.cn: 越来越多了，两国大学每年都互相派留学生，还有文化节。
lines.py: Yuè lái yuè duō le, liǎng guó dàxué měi nián dōu hùxiāng pài liúxuéshēng, hái yǒu wénhuàjié.
lines.en: More and more — our universities exchange students every year, and there are culture festivals.

lines.cn: 交流让两国人民的友谊越来越深。
lines.py: Jiāoliú ràng liǎng guó rénmín de yǒuyì yuè lái yuè shēn.
lines.en: Exchange keeps deepening the friendship between our two peoples.

proverbs-sayings.scene_en: A student asks about a common Chinese saying.

lines.cn: 老师常说"熟能生巧"，这是什么意思？
lines.py: Lǎoshī cháng shuō "shú néng shēng qiǎo", zhè shì shénme yìsi?
lines.en: The teacher often says "shú néng shēng qiǎo" — what does it mean?

lines.cn: 意思是做的次数多了，自然就掌握了技巧，跟英语的 practice makes perfect 一样。
lines.py: Yìsi shì zuò de cìshù duō le, zìrán jiù zhǎngwò le jìqiǎo, gēn Yīngyǔ de practice makes perfect yíyàng.
lines.en: It means doing something many times naturally makes you skilled — like "practice makes perfect" in English.

lines.cn: 原来如此！那"万事开头难"呢？
lines.py: Yuánlái rúcǐ! Nà "wànshì kāitóu nán" ne?
lines.en: I see! And what about "wànshì kāitóu nán"?

lines.cn: 就是说任何事情开始的时候最难，坚持下去就会容易起来。
lines.py: Jiùshì shuō rènhé shìqing kāishǐ de shíhou zuì nán, jiānchí xiàqù jiù huì róngyì qǐlái.
lines.en: It means the beginning of anything is the hardest part — keep going and it gets easier.

lines.cn: 汉语的俗语真有意思，一句话就能讲清楚一个道理。
lines.py: Hànyǔ de súyǔ zhēn yǒu yìsi, yí jù huà jiù néng jiǎng qīngchu yí gè dàolǐ.
lines.en: Chinese sayings are fascinating — one sentence can capture a whole truth.

food-culture.scene_en: Explaining dumplings and food customs to a foreign friend.

lines.cn: 为什么过年一定要吃饺子呢？
lines.py: Wèishénme guònián yídìng yào chī jiǎozi ne?
lines.en: Why must people eat dumplings at Chinese New Year?

lines.cn: 饺子的样子像古代的钱，代表新的一年发财，全家一起包更热闹。
lines.py: Jiǎozi de yàngzi xiàng gǔdài de qián, dàibiǎo xīn de yì nián fācái, quánjiā yìqǐ bāo gèng rènao.
lines.en: Dumplings look like ancient money, symbolizing wealth for the new year — and making them together is part of the fun.

lines.cn: 我听说不同地方的口味差别很大？
lines.py: Wǒ tīngshuō bùtóng dìfang de kǒuwèi chābié hěn dà?
lines.en: I heard flavors differ a lot from region to region?

lines.cn: 对，南方人爱吃甜的，四川人无辣不欢，北方菜偏咸。
lines.py: Duì, nánfāng rén ài chī tián de, Sìchuān rén wú là bù huān, běifāng cài piān xián.
lines.en: Yes — southerners like sweet, Sichuan people can't live without spice, and northern food tends salty.

lines.cn: "民以食为天"，中国的饮食文化真是博大精深。
lines.py: "Mín yǐ shí wéi tiān", Zhōngguó de yǐnshí wénhuà zhēnshi bódà-jīngshēn.
lines.en: "Food is heaven to the people" — Chinese food culture is truly broad and profound.

lines.cn: 快到中秋节了，你们家有什么习俗？
lines.py: Kuài dào Zhōngqiūjié le, nǐmen jiā yǒu shénme xísú?
lines.en: Mid-Autumn Festival is coming — what customs does your family have?

lines.cn: 全家一起吃月饼、赏月。中秋讲究的就是团圆。
lines.py: Quánjiā yìqǐ chī yuèbǐng, shǎng yuè. Zhōngqiū jiǎngjiu de jiùshì tuányuán.
lines.en: The whole family eats mooncakes and admires the moon together. Mid-Autumn is all about reunion.

lines.cn: 要是家人在外地回不来呢？
lines.py: Yàoshi jiārén zài wàidì huí bu lái ne?
lines.en: What if family members are away and can't come back?

lines.cn: 那就打视频电话，"千里共婵娟"嘛，看的是同一个月亮。
lines.py: Nà jiù dǎ shìpín diànhuà, "qiānlǐ gòng chánjuān" ma, kàn de shì tóng yí gè yuèliang.
lines.en: Then we video call — as the poem says, though a thousand miles apart, we share the same moon.

lines.cn: 真浪漫。送月饼有什么讲究吗？
lines.py: Zhēn làngmàn. Sòng yuèbǐng yǒu shénme jiǎngjiu ma?
lines.en: How romantic. Are there customs about giving mooncakes?

lines.cn: 给长辈送双数的，表示祝福。下周我带你去尝尝我家乡的鲜肉月饼。
lines.py: Gěi zhǎngbèi sòng shuāngshù de, biǎoshì zhùfú. Xià zhōu wǒ dài nǐ qù chángchang wǒ jiāxiāng de xiānròu yuèbǐng.
lines.en: Give elders an even number, as a blessing. Next week I will take you to try my hometown's fresh-meat mooncakes.

scenic-spots.scene_en: Planning a visit to the Great Wall.

lines.cn: 这周六我们去爬长城吧！都说"不到长城非好汉"。
lines.py: Zhè zhōuliù wǒmen qù pá Chángchéng ba! Dōu shuō "bú dào Chángchéng fēi hǎohàn".
lines.en: Let's climb the Great Wall this Saturday! As they say, "You're not a true hero until you've been to the Great Wall."

lines.cn: 好啊！去八达岭还是慕田峪？
lines.py: Hǎo a! Qù Bādálǐng háishi Mùtiányù?
lines.en: Sure! Badaling or Mutianyu?

lines.cn: 慕田峪人少一些，风景也美，就是远一点儿。
lines.py: Mùtiányù rén shǎo yìxiē, fēngjǐng yě měi, jiùshì yuǎn yìdiǎnr.
lines.en: Mutianyu is less crowded and beautiful — just a bit farther.

lines.cn: 没关系，我们早点儿出发。门票要提前在网上订吗？
lines.py: Méi guānxi, wǒmen zǎodiǎnr chūfā. Ménpiào yào tíqián zài wǎngshàng dìng ma?
lines.en: No problem, we will leave early. Should we book tickets online in advance?

lines.cn: 要，周末游客多，提前订还能便宜十块钱。
lines.py: Yào, zhōumò yóukè duō, tíqián dìng hái néng piányi shí kuài qián.
lines.en: Yes — weekends are busy, and booking ahead saves ten yuan.

lines.cn: 那就这么定了，我顺便查查天气预报。
lines.py: Nà jiù zhème dìng le, wǒ shùnbiàn chácha tiānqì yùbào.
lines.en: Settled then — I will check the weather forecast while I am at it.

historical-figures.scene_en: After visiting a museum, two friends talk about Confucius.

lines.cn: 今天博物馆里介绍的孔子，到底是个什么样的人？
lines.py: Jīntiān bówùguǎn li jièshào de Kǒngzǐ, dàodǐ shì ge shénmeyàng de rén?
lines.en: The museum today introduced Confucius — what kind of person was he exactly?

lines.cn: 他是两千多年前的教育家和思想家，最早提出"因材施教"。
lines.py: Tā shì liǎngqiān duō nián qián de jiàoyùjiā hé sīxiǎngjiā, zuì zǎo tíchū "yīn cái shī jiào".
lines.en: He was an educator and thinker from over two thousand years ago — the first to propose teaching students according to their aptitude.

lines.cn: 难怪有那么多人尊重他。他的学生很多吗？
lines.py: Nánguài yǒu nàme duō rén zūnzhòng tā. Tā de xuésheng hěn duō ma?
lines.en: No wonder so many people respect him. Did he have many students?

lines.cn: 传说有三千弟子。他的思想记录在《论语》里，到今天还影响着中国人。
lines.py: Chuánshuō yǒu sānqiān dìzǐ. Tā de sīxiǎng jìlù zài "Lúnyǔ" li, dào jīntiān hái yǐngxiǎng zhe Zhōngguórén.
lines.en: Three thousand, legend says. His ideas are recorded in the Analects and still influence Chinese people today.

lines.cn: "三人行，必有我师"就是他说的吧？我特别喜欢这句话。
lines.py: "Sān rén xíng, bì yǒu wǒ shī" jiùshì tā shuō de ba? Wǒ tèbié xǐhuan zhè jù huà.
lines.en: "Among any three people walking, one can be my teacher" — that was him, right? I love that line.
